utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Julie hi ! Chandler Bing , I , I guess you remember me .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It is a nickname , I will explain later .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ah , uh , I owe you a long overdue apology . I never should have broken up with you because you were overweight .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I owe you a long overdue apology . I never should have broken up with you because you were overweight .

utterances.speaker: Julie
utterances.text: That is why you broke up with me ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_That is why you broke up with me ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You ... you ... you did not know that ? Well , I guess my work here is done !

emotion_cause.span: 7_You ... you ... you did not know that ?
